emails.subject: FW: Trailblazer w/S.Horton, D.McCarty
emails.body: FW: Trailblazer w/S.Horton, D.McCarty Can you attend this one for me? They are working on the sale of our interest in the Trailblazer Pipeline. Sounds like a reasonable deal to me. Inline attachment follows From: </O=ENRON/OU=NA/CN=RECIPIENTS/CN=KCAMPOS> Date: Monday, November 26, 2001 9:44:28 GMT

emails.subject: RE: Trailblazer w/S.Horton, D.McCarty
emails.body: RE: Trailblazer w/S.Horton, D.McCarty yes, what is the deal that sounds reasonable? To: Howard, Kevin A.

emails.subject: RE: Trailblazer w/S.Horton, D.McCarty
emails.body: They took bids and I think have an offer of about $60 MM or so. Michael: What do you know about this one? To: Hayslett, Rod
